# timds — full reference for AI agents

React component library with a built-in design system (shadcn/ui new-york + Tailwind v4). Consumed as a compiled package: import components from `timds` and styles from `timds/styles.css`.

## Setup & rules

```bash
npm install github:welington-sampaio/timds
```

```tsx
import 'timds/styles.css' // em main.tsx/entrypoint (JS, não via CSS @import)
import { Button, Card } from 'timds'
```

- Importe TODOS os componentes de `timds` — nunca de subcaminhos.
- Importe `timds/styles.css` via JS no entrypoint.
- Carregue a fonte Inter no seu app (o DS não a carrega) — veja `setup.font`.
- Para gráficos, instale `recharts` (peerDependency) — veja `setup.charts`.
- Para usar utilitários de token (bg-primary, etc.) na sua própria marcação, adicione o bridge `@theme` do campo `setup.tailwindBridge` ao seu CSS (precisa de Tailwind v4 no app).
- Use apenas utilitários de cor semânticos (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground, etc.); nunca cores cruas (bg-blue-500).
- Cores vívidas têm token de fill (bg-success) e token de texto (text-success-text). Para texto/ícone use o `-text`.
- Ícones via lucide-react. Botões só com ícone precisam de aria-label.

## Design tokens

Radius base: `0.75rem`. Font: `Inter`.

Use these as Tailwind utilities (`bg-*`, `text-*`, `border-*`). Light/dark resolve automatically.

- `background` — light `oklch(1 0 0)`, dark `oklch(0.159 0.023 279.4)`
- `foreground` — light `oklch(0.202 0.02 289.1)`, dark `oklch(0.939 0.015 281.9)`
- `card` — light `oklch(1 0 0)`, dark `oklch(0.208 0.041 282.2)`
- `card-foreground` — light `oklch(0.202 0.02 289.1)`, dark `oklch(0.939 0.015 281.9)`
- `popover` — light `oklch(1 0 0)`, dark `oklch(0.231 0.044 284.4)`
- `popover-foreground` — light `oklch(0.202 0.02 289.1)`, dark `oklch(0.939 0.015 281.9)`
- `primary` — light `oklch(0.549 0.233 300.8)`, dark `oklch(0.56 0.217 302.6)`
- `primary-foreground` — light `oklch(0.99 0 0)`, dark `oklch(0.99 0 0)`
- `primary-text` — light `oklch(0.52 0.22 300.8)`, dark `oklch(0.74 0.18 302.6)`
- `secondary` — light `oklch(0.965 0.012 296.4)`, dark `oklch(0.238 0.047 285.9)`
- `secondary-foreground` — light `oklch(0.286 0.047 290.1)`, dark `oklch(0.939 0.015 281.9)`
- `muted` — light `oklch(0.965 0.012 296.4)`, dark `oklch(0.238 0.047 285.9)`
- `muted-foreground` — light `oklch(0.535 0.042 286.6)`, dark `oklch(0.665 0.063 279.3)`
- `accent` — light `oklch(0.946 0.023 299.4)`, dark `oklch(0.303 0.064 285.7)`
- `accent-foreground` — light `oklch(0.286 0.047 290.1)`, dark `oklch(0.939 0.015 281.9)`
- `destructive` — light `oklch(0.564 0.222 17.6)`, dark `oklch(0.56 0.193 12.7)`
- `destructive-foreground` — light `oklch(0.99 0 0)`, dark `oklch(0.99 0 0)`
- `destructive-text` — light `oklch(0.54 0.2 17.6)`, dark `oklch(0.72 0.17 12.7)`
- `border` — light `oklch(0.9 0.018 297.5)`, dark `oklch(0.34 0.05 285.7)`
- `input` — light `oklch(0.87 0.02 297.5)`, dark `oklch(0.39 0.05 285.3)`
- `ring` — light `oklch(0.549 0.233 300.8)`, dark `oklch(0.622 0.217 302.6)`
- `chart-1` — light `oklch(0.549 0.233 300.8)`, dark `oklch(0.622 0.217 302.6)`
- `chart-2` — light `oklch(0.656 0.132 238.2)`, dark `oklch(0.757 0.122 237.7)`
- `chart-3` — light `oklch(0.46 0.161 271.4)`, dark `oklch(0.533 0.147 266.5)`
- `chart-4` — light `oklch(0.614 0.195 352.8)`, dark `oklch(0.672 0.189 352.4)`
- `chart-5` — light `oklch(0.631 0.134 162.7)`, dark `oklch(0.773 0.153 163.2)`
- `sidebar` — light `oklch(0.984 0.005 297.7)`, dark `oklch(0.172 0.031 282.7)`
- `sidebar-foreground` — light `oklch(0.202 0.02 289.1)`, dark `oklch(0.939 0.015 281.9)`
- `sidebar-primary` — light `oklch(0.549 0.233 300.8)`, dark `oklch(0.56 0.217 302.6)`
- `sidebar-primary-foreground` — light `oklch(0.99 0 0)`, dark `oklch(0.99 0 0)`
- `sidebar-accent` — light `oklch(0.946 0.023 299.4)`, dark `oklch(0.238 0.047 285.9)`
- `sidebar-accent-foreground` — light `oklch(0.286 0.047 290.1)`, dark `oklch(0.939 0.015 281.9)`
- `sidebar-border` — light `oklch(0.925 0.016 297.5)`, dark `oklch(0.303 0.064 285.7)`
- `sidebar-ring` — light `oklch(0.549 0.233 300.8)`, dark `oklch(0.622 0.217 302.6)`
- `success` — light `oklch(0.627 0.17 149.2)`, dark `oklch(0.773 0.153 163.2)`
- `success-foreground` — light `oklch(0.22 0.05 149.2)`, dark `oklch(0.18 0.03 165)`
- `success-text` — light `oklch(0.52 0.15 149.2)`, dark `oklch(0.773 0.153 163.2)`
- `warning` — light `oklch(0.666 0.157 58.3)`, dark `oklch(0.837 0.164 84.4)`
- `warning-foreground` — light `oklch(0.22 0.05 58.3)`, dark `oklch(0.2 0.04 80)`
- `warning-text` — light `oklch(0.52 0.13 58.3)`, dark `oklch(0.837 0.164 84.4)`
- `info` — light `oklch(0.685 0.148 237.3)`, dark `oklch(0.757 0.122 237.7)`
- `info-foreground` — light `oklch(0.22 0.05 237.3)`, dark `oklch(0.18 0.03 240)`
- `info-text` — light `oklch(0.52 0.15 237.3)`, dark `oklch(0.757 0.122 237.7)`

## Components

### Data Display

#### Avatar `Stable`

Represents a user or entity with an image, falling back to initials when no image is available.

Import: `import { Avatar, AvatarBadge, AvatarFallback, AvatarGroup, AvatarGroupCount, AvatarImage } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`

Props:
- `size` (default: `default`) — Avatar diameter; propagated to badge and group count.

Example:

```tsx
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarBadge, AvatarGroup, AvatarGroupCount } from 'timds'

// Image with initials fallback
<Avatar>
  <AvatarImage src="/users/ada.png" alt="Ada Lovelace" />
  <AvatarFallback>AL</AvatarFallback>
</Avatar>

// With a status dot
<Avatar size="lg">
  <AvatarImage src="/users/ada.png" alt="Ada Lovelace" />
  <AvatarFallback>AL</AvatarFallback>
  <AvatarBadge className="bg-success" />
</Avatar>

// Stacked group
<AvatarGroup>
  <Avatar><AvatarFallback>AL</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
  <Avatar><AvatarFallback>CB</AvatarFallback></Avatar>
  <AvatarGroupCount>+3</AvatarGroupCount>
</AvatarGroup>
```

#### Badge `Stable`

A compact pill that labels, counts, or surfaces the status of an item.

Import: `import { Badge, badgeVariants } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `secondary`, `destructive`, `warning`, `info`, `outline`, `ghost`, `link`, `success`, `chart-1`, `chart-2`, `chart-3`, `chart-4`, `chart-5`
- `size`: `sm`, `md`, `lg`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Visual style of the badge.
- `size` (default: `md`) — Padding and font size of the badge.
- `children` — Badge content.
- `asChild` — Render the styling onto the child element (e.g. an 

Example:

```tsx
import { Badge } from 'timds'

<Badge>New</Badge>
<Badge variant="success">Completed</Badge>
<Badge variant="warning" size="sm">Pending</Badge>

// As a link (e.g. a filter chip)
<Badge asChild variant="outline">
  <a href="#filters">Filters</a>
</Badge>
```

#### Chart `Stable`

A thin, themeable wrapper around [Recharts](https://recharts.org) that drives series colors, tooltips and legends from one design-system-aware config.

Import: `import { ChartContainer, ChartLegend, ChartLegendContent, ChartStyle, ChartTooltip, ChartTooltipContent, ChartConfig } from 'timds'`

Example:

```tsx
import {
  type ChartConfig,
  ChartContainer,
  ChartTooltip,
  ChartTooltipContent,
} from 'timds'
import { Area, AreaChart, CartesianGrid, XAxis } from 'recharts'

const config = {
  desktop: { label: 'Desktop', color: 'var(--chart-1)' },
} satisfies ChartConfig

<ChartContainer config={config} className="h-[240px] w-full">
  <AreaChart accessibilityLayer data={data}>
    <CartesianGrid vertical={false} />
    <XAxis dataKey="month" tickLine={false} axisLine={false} />
    <ChartTooltip cursor={false} content={<ChartTooltipContent />} />
    {/* a cor `desktop` vira a variável CSS `--color-desktop` */}
    <Area dataKey="desktop" fill="var(--color-desktop)" stroke="var(--color-desktop)" />
  </AreaChart>
</ChartContainer>
```

#### Item `Stable`

A flexible row primitive for lists, cards, and menus — a leading media slot, a central title/description, and trailing actions, composed from small named parts.

Import: `import { Item, ItemActions, ItemContent, ItemDescription, ItemFooter, ItemGroup, ItemHeader, ItemMedia, ItemSeparator, ItemTitle, itemVariants } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `outline`, `muted`, `icon`, `image`
- `size`: `default`, `sm`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Visual style of the row surface.
- `size` (default: `default`) — Padding and gap density.
- `asChild` (default: `false`) — Merge props onto the single child instead of rendering a 

Example:

```tsx
import {
  Avatar,
  AvatarFallback,
  AvatarImage,
  Button,
  Item,
  ItemActions,
  ItemContent,
  ItemDescription,
  ItemGroup,
  ItemMedia,
  ItemSeparator,
  ItemTitle,
} from 'timds'

// Basic row with a trailing action
<Item variant="outline">
  <ItemContent>
    <ItemTitle>Basic Item</ItemTitle>
    <ItemDescription>A simple row with title and description.</ItemDescription>
  </ItemContent>
  <ItemActions>
    <Button variant="outline" size="sm">Action</Button>
  </ItemActions>
</Item>

// The whole row as a link
<Item variant="outline" asChild>
  <a href="/docs">
    <ItemContent>
      <ItemTitle>Visit our documentation</ItemTitle>
      <ItemDescription>Learn how to get started.</ItemDescription>
    </ItemContent>
  </a>
</Item>

// A grouped, separated list
<ItemGroup>
  <Item>
    <ItemMedia>
      <Avatar>
        <AvatarImage src="/shadcn.png" alt="shadcn" />
        <AvatarFallback>S</AvatarFallback>
      </Avatar>
    </ItemMedia>
    <ItemContent>
      <ItemTitle>shadcn</ItemTitle>
      <ItemDescription>shadcn@vercel.com</ItemDescription>
    </ItemContent>
  </Item>
  <ItemSeparator />
  {/* …more items */}
</ItemGroup>
```

#### Table `Stable`

Displays tabular data in rows and columns, built on native HTML table elements.

Import: `import { Table, TableBody, TableCaption, TableCell, TableFooter, TableGroupRow, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow } from 'timds'`

Props:
- `className` — Extra classes merged onto the 

Example:

```tsx
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCaption,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from 'timds'

<Table>
  <TableCaption>Recent invoices.</TableCaption>
  <TableHeader>
    <TableRow>
      <TableHead>Invoice</TableHead>
      <TableHead className="text-right">Amount</TableHead>
    </TableRow>
  </TableHeader>
  <TableBody>
    {invoices.map((row) => (
      <TableRow key={row.invoice}>
        <TableCell className="font-medium">{row.invoice}</TableCell>
        <TableCell className="text-right">{row.amount}</TableCell>
      </TableRow>
    ))}
  </TableBody>
</Table>
```

### Data Entry

#### Button `Stable`

Triggers an action or event — the primary way users commit to something in the UI.

Import: `import { Button, buttonVariants, ButtonProps } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `destructive`, `outline`, `secondary`, `ghost`, `link`
- `size`: `default`, `sm`, `lg`, `icon`
- `shape`: `default`, `rounded`
- `block`: `true`, `false`
- `iconPlacement`: `left`, `right`
- `htmlType`: `button`, `submit`, `reset`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Visual style / emphasis of the button.
- `size` (default: `default`) — Height and padding preset. Use 
- `shape` (default: `default`) — Corner shape. 
- `iconPlacement` (default: `left`) — Side where the 
- `icon` — Icon node shown alongside the content.
- `loading` — Show a spinner in place of the icon and disable the button.
- `block` (default: `false`) — Stretch the button to fill its container width.
- `htmlType` (default: `button`) — Native 
- `href` — Render the button as an 
- `asChild` — Merge props onto the child element instead of rendering a 
- `disabled` — Disables interaction and dims the button.
- `children` — Button label or content.

Example:

```tsx
import { Button } from 'timds'

<Button onClick={handleSave}>Save</Button>
<Button variant="secondary" onClick={handleCancel}>Cancel</Button>
<Button icon={<Rocket />} loading>Launching</Button>
<Button href="https://example.com">Open link</Button>
```

#### ButtonGroup `Stable`

A layout wrapper that joins buttons (and related controls) into a single continuous segment, collapsing the inner borders and corners between them.

Import: `import { ButtonGroup, ButtonGroupSeparator, ButtonGroupText, buttonGroupVariants } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `orientation`: `horizontal`, `vertical`

Props:
- `orientation` (default: `horizontal`) — Direction the buttons are stacked in.

Example:

```tsx
import { Button, ButtonGroup, ButtonGroupSeparator, ButtonGroupText } from 'timds'

// Joined actions
<ButtonGroup>
  <Button variant="outline">Archive</Button>
  <Button variant="outline">Report</Button>
  <Button variant="outline">Snooze</Button>
</ButtonGroup>

// Stepper with a static value
<ButtonGroup>
  <Button variant="outline" size="icon" aria-label="Decrease"><Minus /></Button>
  <ButtonGroupText>12</ButtonGroupText>
  <Button variant="outline" size="icon" aria-label="Increase"><Plus /></Button>
</ButtonGroup>

// Vertical stack
<ButtonGroup orientation="vertical">
  <Button variant="outline">Top</Button>
  <Button variant="outline">Bottom</Button>
</ButtonGroup>
```

#### Calendar `Stable`

An inline month grid for selecting a single date, a range, or multiple days.

Import: `import { Calendar, CalendarDayButton } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `mode`: `single`, `range`, `multiple`
- `captionLayout`: `label`, `dropdown`, `dropdown-months`, `dropdown-years`
- `buttonVariant`: `default`, `outline`, `ghost`, `secondary`

Props:
- `mode` — Selection shape (drives the 
- `captionLayout` (default: `label`) — Header as a static label or month/year dropdowns.
- `numberOfMonths` (default: `1`) — How many months to render side by side.
- `showOutsideDays` (default: `true`) — Show leading/trailing days from adjacent months.
- `buttonVariant` (default: `ghost`) — Button variant used by the navigation arrows.

Example:

```tsx
import { Calendar } from 'timds'
import { useState } from 'react'
import type { DateRange } from 'react-day-picker'

// Single date (controlled)
const [date, setDate] = useState<Date>()
<Calendar mode="single" selected={date} onSelect={setDate} />

// Range
const [range, setRange] = useState<DateRange>()
<Calendar mode="range" selected={range} onSelect={setRange} numberOfMonths={2} />

// Constrain selectable days + dropdown caption
<Calendar mode="single" disabled={{ before: new Date() }} captionLayout="dropdown" />
```

#### Checkbox `Stable`

A boolean control for selecting an option, typically as part of a form submitted later.

Import: `import { Checkbox, CheckboxGroup, CheckboxGroupItem, checkboxVariants, CheckboxGroupItemProps, CheckboxGroupProps, CheckboxProps } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `success`, `destructive`
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Chromatic scheme of the box when checked.
- `size` (default: `default`) — Box and inner icon size.
- `disabled` — Disables the checkbox.
- `checked` — Controlled checked state.
- `defaultChecked` — Initial checked state (uncontrolled).

Example:

```tsx
import { Checkbox, CheckboxGroup, CheckboxGroupItem } from 'timds'

// Single checkbox paired with a label
<label htmlFor="terms" className="flex items-center gap-2">
  <Checkbox id="terms" />
  Accept the terms
</label>

// Controlled
<Checkbox checked={checked} onCheckedChange={(v) => setChecked(v === true)} />

// Indeterminate
<Checkbox checked="indeterminate" />

// Group of related values
<CheckboxGroup defaultValue={['react']} onValueChange={setValues}>
  <CheckboxGroupItem value="react" />
  <CheckboxGroupItem value="vue" />
</CheckboxGroup>
```

#### DatePicker `Stable`

A trigger that shows the selected date and opens a calendar popover to pick a single day.

Import: `import { DatePicker, DatePickerProps } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`
- `align`: `start`, `center`, `end`

Props:
- `placeholder` (default: `Pick a date`) — Text shown on the trigger while no date is selected.
- `formatStr` (default: `PPP`) — date-fns format string for the trigger label.
- `size` (default: `default`) — Trigger size.
- `align` (default: `start`) — Popover alignment relative to the trigger.
- `block` — Full-width trigger.
- `disabled` — Disables the trigger.
- `value` — Selected date (controlled).
- `defaultValue` — Initial date (uncontrolled).

Example:

```tsx
import { DatePicker } from 'timds'

// Uncontrolled
<DatePicker defaultValue={new Date()} onValueChange={(date) => console.log(date)} />

// Controlled
<DatePicker value={date} onValueChange={setDate} />

// Localized label + constrained calendar
<DatePicker
  formatStr="dd/MM/yyyy"
  calendarProps={{ disabled: { before: new Date() }, captionLayout: 'dropdown' }}
/>

// In a form (emits a hidden yyyy-MM-dd input)
<DatePicker name="dueDate" />
```

#### Input `Stable`

A single-line text field — the primary way users enter free-form text into a form.

Import: `import { Input } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `type`: `text`, `email`, `password`, `number`, `search`, `tel`, `url`, `file`

Props:
- `type` (default: `text`) — Native 
- `placeholder` — Placeholder shown while the field is empty.
- `value` — Controlled value of the field.
- `disabled` — Disables the field: not focusable, ignores input.
- `onChange` — Fires on every value change.

Example:

```tsx
import { Input } from 'timds'

// Labelled field
<label htmlFor="email">E-mail</label>
<Input id="email" type="email" placeholder="voce@exemplo.com" />

// Error state
<Input aria-invalid value={email} onChange={onEmailChange} />

// Disabled
<Input disabled value="Não editável" />
```

#### InputGroup `Stable`

A container that wraps a text control with addons — icons, text or buttons — sharing a single border, focus ring and error state.

Import: `import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon, InputGroupButton, InputGroupInput, InputGroupText, InputGroupTextarea } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `size`: `xs`, `sm`

Props:
- `children` — Inner control (

Example:

```tsx
import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon, InputGroupInput, InputGroupButton, InputGroupText } from 'timds'
import { Search } from 'lucide-react'

// Search field with a leading icon
<InputGroup>
  <InputGroupAddon>
    <Search />
  </InputGroupAddon>
  <InputGroupInput placeholder="Buscar…" aria-label="Buscar" />
</InputGroup>

// Field with a trailing action button
<InputGroup>
  <InputGroupInput aria-label="Cupom" />
  <InputGroupAddon align="inline-end">
    <InputGroupButton onClick={apply}>Aplicar</InputGroupButton>
  </InputGroupAddon>
</InputGroup>
```

#### InputOTP `Stable`

A fixed-length code field that splits a one-time password or verification code into per-character slots.

Import: `import { InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSeparator, InputOTPSlot } from 'timds'`

Props:
- `maxLength` — Total number of characters/slots the field accepts.
- `pattern` — Regex restricting accepted characters (e.g. 
- `disabled` — Disables the field.
- `value` — Controlled value.
- `onChange` — Fires with the full string on every change.
- `children` — Slot layout: 

Example:

```tsx
import { InputOTP, InputOTPGroup, InputOTPSlot, InputOTPSeparator } from 'timds'
import { REGEXP_ONLY_DIGITS } from 'input-otp'

<InputOTP maxLength={6} pattern={REGEXP_ONLY_DIGITS} onChange={setCode}>
  <InputOTPGroup>
    <InputOTPSlot index={0} />
    <InputOTPSlot index={1} />
    <InputOTPSlot index={2} />
  </InputOTPGroup>
  <InputOTPSeparator />
  <InputOTPGroup>
    <InputOTPSlot index={3} />
    <InputOTPSlot index={4} />
    <InputOTPSlot index={5} />
  </InputOTPGroup>
</InputOTP>
```

#### RadioGroup `Stable`

A set of mutually exclusive options where exactly one can be selected at a time.

Import: `import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `orientation`: `vertical`, `horizontal`

Props:
- `defaultValue` — Initially selected value (uncontrolled).
- `disabled` — Disable the entire group.
- `orientation` — Layout/keyboard navigation direction.
- `onValueChange` — Fired with the newly selected value.

Example:

```tsx
import { RadioGroup, RadioGroupItem } from 'timds'

// Uncontrolled
<RadioGroup defaultValue="yearly" aria-label="Plan">
  <label htmlFor="monthly">
    <RadioGroupItem id="monthly" value="monthly" /> Monthly
  </label>
  <label htmlFor="yearly">
    <RadioGroupItem id="yearly" value="yearly" /> Yearly
  </label>
</RadioGroup>

// Controlled
<RadioGroup value={value} onValueChange={setValue} aria-label="Plan">
  {/* …items */}
</RadioGroup>
```

#### Select `Stable`

An advanced Select / Combobox built on **Ariakit** with search, multi-select, custom rendering, async loading and list virtualization — not the native `<select>`.

Import: `import { Select, SelectContent, SelectEmpty, SelectGroup, SelectItem, SelectList, SelectLoading, SelectRoot, SelectSearch, SelectTrigger, SelectValue, selectTriggerVariants, SelectMessages, SelectOption, SelectProps } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`

Props:
- `options` — Lista de opções (
- `size` (default: `default`) — Altura do trigger.
- `searchable` — Exibe o campo de busca.
- `multiple` — Multi-seleção com chips.
- `clearable` — Exibe o botão de limpar.
- `editable` — Gatilho editável (autocomplete no próprio campo).
- `allowCustomValue` — Editável: aceita texto fora da lista.
- `maxCount` — Multi: nº máximo de itens (mostra 
- `maxDisplayChips` — Multi: chips antes de resumir em 
- `virtualized` — Liga a virtualização (auto para > 100 itens).
- `loading` — Indicador de carregamento na lista.
- `hasMore` — Há mais itens para o infinite scroll.
- `disabled` — Desabilita o trigger.
- `value` — Valor selecionado (controlado).
- `placeholder` — Texto quando nada está selecionado.

Example:

```tsx
import { Select, type SelectOption } from 'timds'

const fruits: SelectOption[] = [
  { value: 'apple', label: 'Maçã' },
  { value: 'banana', label: 'Banana' },
  { value: 'pear', label: 'Pera', disabled: true },
]

// Single, searchable
<Select options={fruits} searchable placeholder="Pick a fruit…" aria-label="Fruit" />

// Multi-select with chips, a clear button and a cap
<Select
  options={fruits}
  multiple
  clearable
  maxCount={3}
  defaultValue={['apple', 'banana']}
  aria-label="Fruits"
/>

// Async + infinite scroll
<Select
  options={options}
  searchable
  onSearch={fetchOptions}
  loading={loading}
  onLoadMore={loadMore}
  hasMore={hasMore}
  aria-label="User"
/>

// Editable autocomplete that accepts free text
<Select
  options={fruits}
  editable
  allowCustomValue
  multiple
  aria-label="Tags"
/>
```

#### Slider `Stable`

An input for picking a numeric value — or a range — by dragging a thumb along a track.

Import: `import { sliderRangeVariants, Slider, sliderThumbVariants, SliderProps } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `success`, `destructive`
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`
- `orientation`: `horizontal`, `vertical`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Chromatic scheme of the filled range and thumb.
- `size` (default: `default`) — Track thickness and thumb diameter.
- `min` — Minimum value.
- `max` — Maximum value.
- `step` — Stepping interval.
- `orientation` (default: `horizontal`) — Layout direction of the slider.
- `disabled` — Disables the slider.
- `value` — Controlled value (array).
- `defaultValue` — Initial value as an array (uncontrolled).

Example:

```tsx
import { Slider } from 'timds'

// Single value (uncontrolled)
<Slider defaultValue={[50]} aria-label="Volume" />

// Range
<Slider defaultValue={[20, 80]} aria-label="Price range" />

// Controlled
<Slider value={value} onValueChange={setValue} aria-label="Brightness" />

// Discrete steps
<Slider defaultValue={[40]} step={10} aria-label="Opacity" />
```

#### Switch `Stable`

A boolean toggle that flips a single setting on or off, taking effect immediately.

Import: `import { Switch, switchVariants, SwitchProps } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`
- `variant`: `default`, `green_red`, `success`, `destructive`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Chromatic scheme of the track (on / off colors).
- `size` (default: `default`) — Track height and thumb size.
- `texts` — Optional 
- `disabled` — Disables the switch.
- `checked` — Controlled checked state.
- `defaultChecked` — Initial checked state (uncontrolled).

Example:

```tsx
import { Switch } from 'timds'

// Uncontrolled
<Switch defaultChecked aria-label="Notifications" />

// Controlled
<Switch checked={enabled} onCheckedChange={setEnabled} aria-label="Dark mode" />

// With in-track labels (decorative) + an accessible name
<Switch texts={{ on: 'Ativo', off: 'Inativo' }} variant="green_red" aria-label="Status" />
```

#### Textarea `Stable`

A multi-line text field for free-form input that can span several lines.

Import: `import { Textarea } from 'timds'`

Props:
- `placeholder` — Placeholder text.
- `disabled` — Disable the field.
- `rows` — Initial visible number of text lines.

Example:

```tsx
import { Textarea } from 'timds'

// Com label associado (nome acessível)
<label htmlFor="bio">Bio</label>
<Textarea id="bio" placeholder="Tell us about yourself…" />

// Estado de erro
<Textarea aria-invalid aria-describedby="bio-error" />

// Desabilitado
<Textarea disabled value="Read-only" />
```

#### Toggle `Stable`

A two-state button that stays pressed once activated — for binary, on/off controls like a formatting mark in a toolbar.

Import: `import { Toggle, toggleVariants } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `outline`
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Visual style: transparent (
- `size` (default: `default`) — Control height and minimum width.
- `disabled` — Disables the toggle.
- `pressed` — Controlled pressed state.
- `defaultPressed` — Initial pressed state (uncontrolled).

Example:

```tsx
import { Toggle } from 'timds'
import { Bold } from 'lucide-react'

function BoldToggle() {
  return (
    <Toggle aria-label="Bold">
      <Bold />
    </Toggle>
  )
}
```

#### ToggleGroup `Stable`

A set of **Toggle** buttons that share styling and coordinate selection — the building block for segmented controls and formatting toolbars.

Import: `import { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `type`: `single`, `multiple`
- `variant`: `default`, `outline`
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`

Props:
- `type` (default: `single`) — Single (
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Visual style shared by every item.
- `size` (default: `default`) — Item height shared by every item.
- `spacing` (default: `0`) — Gap (theme units) between items. 
- `disabled` — Disables every item in the group.

Example:

```tsx
import { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem } from 'timds'
import { AlignLeft, AlignCenter, AlignRight } from 'lucide-react'

// Single selection (radiogroup)
<ToggleGroup type="single" defaultValue="left" aria-label="Text alignment">
  <ToggleGroupItem value="left" aria-label="Align left">
    <AlignLeft />
  </ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="center" aria-label="Align center">
    <AlignCenter />
  </ToggleGroupItem>
  <ToggleGroupItem value="right" aria-label="Align right">
    <AlignRight />
  </ToggleGroupItem>
</ToggleGroup>
```

### Feedback

#### Alert `Stable`

A contextual feedback banner that surfaces a short message inline, in place on the page.

Import: `import { Alert, AlertDescription, AlertTitle } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `destructive`, `warning`, `info`, `accent`, `success`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Neutral, destructive (error) or one of the soft semantic styles (success, warning, info, accent).
- `children` — Composed content — typically an icon, 

Example:

```tsx
import { Alert, AlertTitle, AlertDescription } from 'timds'
import { CheckCircle2 } from 'lucide-react'

<Alert variant="success">
  <CheckCircle2 />
  <AlertTitle>Changes saved</AlertTitle>
  <AlertDescription>Your settings were updated successfully.</AlertDescription>
</Alert>
```

#### Progress `Stable`

A linear bar that communicates how far along a determinate task is, or that work of unknown duration is underway.

Import: `import { Progress, progressVariants } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `success`, `warning`, `info`, `destructive`
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`

Props:
- `variant` (default: `default`) — Chromatic scheme of the track and indicator.
- `size` (default: `default`) — Height of the progress bar.
- `value` — Current progress (0–100). Omit it for the indeterminate state.

Example:

```tsx
import { Progress } from 'timds'

// Determinate — always give it an accessible name.
<Progress value={60} aria-label="Uploading files" />

// Semantic variant + size.
<Progress value={90} variant="destructive" size="lg" aria-label="Storage used" />

// Indeterminate (omit value).
<Progress aria-label="Loading" />
```

#### Skeleton `Stable`

A pulsing placeholder that reserves layout space while real content loads.

Import: `import { Skeleton } from 'timds'`

#### Spinner `Stable`

An animated indicator that communicates an ongoing, indeterminate loading state.

Import: `import { Spinner } from 'timds'`

Props:
- `className` — Tailwind classes to override size (

Example:

```tsx
import { Spinner } from 'timds'

// Tamanho e cor herdados do contexto
<span className="text-primary">
  <Spinner className="size-6" />
</span>

// Dentro de um Button, via a prop `loading`
<Button loading>Salvando</Button>

// Nome acessível customizado
<Spinner aria-label="Salvando alterações" />
```

#### Toaster `Stable`

Brief, non-blocking notifications anchored to a corner of the screen. Built on [sonner](https://sonner.emilkowal.ski/): mount `<Toaster />` once, then fire toasts from anywhere with the imperative `toast` function.

Import: `import { Toaster, toast, ToasterProps } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `position`: `top-left`, `top-center`, `top-right`, `bottom-left`, `bottom-center`, `bottom-right`
- `theme`: `light`, `dark`, `system`

Props:
- `position` (default: `bottom-right`) — Where the stack of toasts is anchored on screen.
- `richColors` (default: `true`) — Colorize toasts by type (success/error/warning/info) using the design tokens.
- `closeButton` — Render an explicit close (×) button on every toast.
- `expand` — Keep toasts expanded instead of stacking them collapsed.
- `duration` (default: `4000`) — Default auto-dismiss time in ms (per toast can override).
- `visibleToasts` (default: `3`) — How many toasts are shown at once before older ones collapse.
- `theme` — Sonner’s internal theme. Colors here come from tokens, so this rarely matters; 

Example:

```tsx
import { Toaster } from 'timds'

export function App({ children }) {
  return (
    <>
      {children}
      <Toaster />
    </>
  )
}
```

### Layout

#### Card `Stable`

A surface container that groups related content and actions into a single panel.

Import: `import { Card, CardAction, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from 'timds'`

Props:
- `title` — CardTitle text.
- `description` — CardDescription text.
- `value` — Main metric shown in CardContent.
- `footer` — Footer button label.

Example:

```tsx
import {
  Card,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
  CardDescription,
  CardAction,
  CardContent,
  CardFooter,
  Button,
  Badge,
} from 'timds'

<Card className="w-80">
  <CardHeader>
    <CardTitle>Total revenue</CardTitle>
    <CardDescription>Last 30 days</CardDescription>
    <CardAction>
      <Badge variant="success">+9.8%</Badge>
    </CardAction>
  </CardHeader>
  <CardContent>
    <p className="text-3xl font-bold">$125,830</p>
  </CardContent>
  <CardFooter>
    <Button variant="outline" className="w-full">View report</Button>
  </CardFooter>
</Card>
```

#### Separator `Stable`

A thin visual divider that groups or splits content, horizontally or vertically.

Import: `import { Separator } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `orientation`: `horizontal`, `vertical`

Props:
- `orientation` (default: `horizontal`) — Direction the divider runs in.
- `decorative` (default: `true`) — When true (default) the separator is purely visual and hidden from assistive tech.

Example:

```tsx
import { Separator } from 'timds'

// Divisor horizontal (decorativo)
<Separator className="my-4" />

// Divisor inline vertical, dentro de um contêiner com altura
<div className="flex h-5 items-center gap-4">
  <span>Docs</span>
  <Separator orientation="vertical" />
  <span>Source</span>
</div>

// Semântico: exposto para tecnologias assistivas
<Separator decorative={false} />
```

### Navigation

#### Pagination `Stable`

Splits long content into pages and lets people move between them.

Import: `import { getPaginationRange, Pagination, PaginationContent, PaginationEllipsis, PaginationItem, PaginationLink, PaginationNext, PaginationPrevious, PaginationShort, PaginationMode, PaginationRangeItem, PaginationRangeOptions, PaginationShortLabels, PaginationShortProps } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `mode`: `full`, `numbers`, `simple`, `compact`
- `size`: `sm`, `default`, `lg`

Props:
- `page` — Current page (1-based).
- `total` — Total number of pages.
- `mode` (default: `full`) — Rendering shape.
- `size` (default: `default`) — Control size.
- `siblingCount` (default: `1`) — Sibling pages around the current one (full/numbers).
- `boundaryCount` (default: `1`) — Fixed pages at each edge (full/numbers).
- `pageSize` — Current rows-per-page value (needs 
- `pageSizeOptions` — Rows-per-page choices; renders the selector when provided.
- `onPageChange` — Called with the chosen page (SPA mode).
- `onPageSizeChange` — Called with the chosen rows-per-page value.
- `href` — Builds each page href (real-links/SSR mode); wins over onPageChange.

Example:

```tsx
import { PaginationShort } from 'timds'

// SPA — controlled by state
const [page, setPage] = useState(1)
<PaginationShort page={page} total={20} onPageChange={setPage} />

// Just previous/next
<PaginationShort mode="simple" page={page} total={20} onPageChange={setPage} />

// Arrows + "Page X of Y"
<PaginationShort mode="compact" page={page} total={20} onPageChange={setPage} />

// Real links (SSR) — renders <a> anchors
<PaginationShort page={page} total={20} href={(n) => `/items?page=${n}`} />

// Rows-per-page selector (table footer)
<PaginationShort
  mode="simple"
  page={page}
  total={20}
  onPageChange={setPage}
  pageSize={pageSize}
  pageSizeOptions={[10, 25, 50, 100]}
  onPageSizeChange={setPageSize}
/>

// i18n labels
<PaginationShort
  page={page}
  total={20}
  onPageChange={setPage}
  labels={{ previous: 'Anterior', next: 'Próximo', page: 'Página', of: 'de' }}
/>
```

#### Tabs `Stable`

Switches between sibling panels of content within the same context, one visible at a time.

Import: `import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger, tabsListVariants } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `tabPlacement`: `top`, `bottom`, `start`, `end`

Props:
- `defaultValue` — Value of the tab selected on mount (uncontrolled).
- `tabPlacement` (default: `top`) — Placement of the tab bar relative to the content.

Example:

```tsx
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from 'timds'

<Tabs defaultValue="home">
  <TabsList variant="pill">
    <TabsTrigger value="home">Home</TabsTrigger>
    <TabsTrigger value="products">Products</TabsTrigger>
  </TabsList>
  <TabsContent value="home">Home panel</TabsContent>
  <TabsContent value="products">Products panel</TabsContent>
</Tabs>

// Editable tabs
<TabsTrigger value="1" closable onClose={() => remove('1')}>
  Tab 1
</TabsTrigger>
```

### Other

#### Sidebar `Stable`

A composable, collapsible application sidebar — the persistent navigation frame for a page, with a desktop layout and a mobile off-canvas overlay built in.

Import: `import { Sidebar, SidebarContent, SidebarFooter, SidebarGroup, SidebarGroupAction, SidebarGroupContent, SidebarGroupLabel, SidebarHeader, SidebarInput, SidebarInset, SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuAction, SidebarMenuBadge, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, SidebarMenuSkeleton, SidebarMenuSub, SidebarMenuSubButton, SidebarMenuSubItem, SidebarProvider, SidebarRail, SidebarSeparator, SidebarTrigger, sidebarMenuButtonVariants, useSidebar } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `variant`: `default`, `outline`, `sidebar`, `floating`, `inset`
- `size`: `default`, `sm`, `lg`
- `side`: `left`, `right`
- `collapsible`: `offcanvas`, `icon`, `none`

Props:
- `side` (default: `left`) — Which edge the sidebar is anchored to.
- `variant` (default: `sidebar`) — Visual treatment: flush 
- `collapsible` (default: `offcanvas`) — How it collapses on desktop: slide 

Example:

```tsx
import {
  Sidebar,
  SidebarContent,
  SidebarGroup,
  SidebarGroupContent,
  SidebarGroupLabel,
  SidebarInset,
  SidebarMenu,
  SidebarMenuButton,
  SidebarMenuItem,
  SidebarProvider,
  SidebarTrigger,
} from 'timds'

export function AppShell({ children }: { children: React.ReactNode }) {
  return (
    <SidebarProvider>
      <Sidebar>
        <SidebarContent>
          <SidebarGroup>
            <SidebarGroupLabel>Platform</SidebarGroupLabel>
            <SidebarGroupContent>
              <SidebarMenu>
                <SidebarMenuItem>
                  <SidebarMenuButton isActive tooltip="Home">
                    <HomeIcon />
                    <span>Home</span>
                  </SidebarMenuButton>
                </SidebarMenuItem>
              </SidebarMenu>
            </SidebarGroupContent>
          </SidebarGroup>
        </SidebarContent>
      </Sidebar>
      <SidebarInset>
        <header className="flex h-12 items-center gap-2 border-b px-4">
          <SidebarTrigger />
        </header>
        {children}
      </SidebarInset>
    </SidebarProvider>
  )
}
```

### Overlays

#### AlertDialog `Stable`

A modal confirmation that interrupts the user and demands an explicit choice before a destructive or irreversible action.

Import: `import { AlertDialog, AlertDialogAction, AlertDialogCancel, AlertDialogContent, AlertDialogDescription, AlertDialogFooter, AlertDialogHeader, AlertDialogMedia, AlertDialogOverlay, AlertDialogPortal, AlertDialogTitle, AlertDialogTrigger } from 'timds'`

Example:

```tsx
import {
  AlertDialog,
  AlertDialogTrigger,
  AlertDialogContent,
  AlertDialogHeader,
  AlertDialogTitle,
  AlertDialogDescription,
  AlertDialogFooter,
  AlertDialogCancel,
  AlertDialogAction,
  Button,
} from 'timds'

<AlertDialog>
  <AlertDialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="destructive">Delete project</Button>
  </AlertDialogTrigger>
  <AlertDialogContent>
    <AlertDialogHeader>
      <AlertDialogTitle>Delete this project?</AlertDialogTitle>
      <AlertDialogDescription>This cannot be undone.</AlertDialogDescription>
    </AlertDialogHeader>
    <AlertDialogFooter>
      <AlertDialogCancel>Keep project</AlertDialogCancel>
      <AlertDialogAction variant="destructive" onClick={handleDelete}>
        Delete
      </AlertDialogAction>
    </AlertDialogFooter>
  </AlertDialogContent>
</AlertDialog>
```

#### Context Menu `Stable`

A menu of actions opened by right-clicking (or long-pressing) a region — the actions appear at the pointer and dismiss once the user picks one or moves away.

Import: `import { ContextMenu, ContextMenuCheckboxItem, ContextMenuContent, ContextMenuGroup, ContextMenuItem, ContextMenuLabel, ContextMenuPortal, ContextMenuRadioGroup, ContextMenuRadioItem, ContextMenuSeparator, ContextMenuShortcut, ContextMenuSub, ContextMenuSubContent, ContextMenuSubTrigger, ContextMenuTrigger } from 'timds'`

Example:

```tsx
import {
  ContextMenu,
  ContextMenuTrigger,
  ContextMenuContent,
  ContextMenuLabel,
  ContextMenuSeparator,
  ContextMenuItem,
  ContextMenuShortcut,
} from 'timds'

<ContextMenu>
  <ContextMenuTrigger className="flex h-32 w-72 items-center justify-center rounded-md border border-dashed text-sm">
    Right click here
  </ContextMenuTrigger>
  <ContextMenuContent className="w-52">
    <ContextMenuLabel>Actions</ContextMenuLabel>
    <ContextMenuSeparator />
    <ContextMenuItem onSelect={handleReload}>
      Reload
      <ContextMenuShortcut>⌘R</ContextMenuShortcut>
    </ContextMenuItem>
    <ContextMenuItem variant="destructive" onSelect={handleDelete}>
      Delete
    </ContextMenuItem>
  </ContextMenuContent>
</ContextMenu>
```

#### Dialog `Stable`

A modal overlay that focuses the user on a single task — a form, details, or a confirmation — before returning them to the page.

Import: `import { Dialog, DialogClose, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogOverlay, DialogPortal, DialogTitle, DialogTrigger } from 'timds'`

Example:

```tsx
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogTrigger,
  DialogContent,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogFooter,
  DialogClose,
  Button,
} from 'timds'

<Dialog>
  <DialogTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Edit profile</Button>
  </DialogTrigger>
  <DialogContent>
    <DialogHeader>
      <DialogTitle>Edit profile</DialogTitle>
      <DialogDescription>Update your details.</DialogDescription>
    </DialogHeader>
    <DialogFooter>
      <DialogClose asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      </DialogClose>
      <DialogClose asChild>
        <Button onClick={handleSave}>Save changes</Button>
      </DialogClose>
    </DialogFooter>
  </DialogContent>
</Dialog>
```

#### Drawer `Stable`

A panel that slides in from an edge of the viewport to hold secondary content — filters, details, navigation, or a short form — without taking over the whole screen.

Import: `import { Drawer, DrawerClose, DrawerContent, DrawerDescription, DrawerFooter, DrawerHeader, DrawerOverlay, DrawerPortal, DrawerTitle, DrawerTrigger } from 'timds'`

Example:

```tsx
import {
  Drawer,
  DrawerTrigger,
  DrawerContent,
  DrawerHeader,
  DrawerTitle,
  DrawerDescription,
  DrawerFooter,
  DrawerClose,
  Button,
} from 'timds'

<Drawer direction="right">
  <DrawerTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Open panel</Button>
  </DrawerTrigger>
  <DrawerContent>
    <DrawerHeader>
      <DrawerTitle>Filters</DrawerTitle>
      <DrawerDescription>Refine the results shown in the list.</DrawerDescription>
    </DrawerHeader>
    <DrawerFooter>
      <Button onClick={handleApply}>Apply</Button>
      <DrawerClose asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Cancel</Button>
      </DrawerClose>
    </DrawerFooter>
  </DrawerContent>
</Drawer>
```

#### Dropdown Menu `Stable`

A menu of actions anchored to a trigger — opened on demand, dismissed once the user picks an action or moves away.

Import: `import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuCheckboxItem, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuPortal, DropdownMenuRadioGroup, DropdownMenuRadioItem, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuShortcut, DropdownMenuSub, DropdownMenuSubContent, DropdownMenuSubTrigger, DropdownMenuTrigger } from 'timds'`

Example:

```tsx
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuShortcut,
  Button,
} from 'timds'

<DropdownMenu>
  <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Open menu</Button>
  </DropdownMenuTrigger>
  <DropdownMenuContent className="w-48">
    <DropdownMenuLabel>My account</DropdownMenuLabel>
    <DropdownMenuSeparator />
    <DropdownMenuItem onSelect={handleProfile}>
      Profile
      <DropdownMenuShortcut>⇧⌘P</DropdownMenuShortcut>
    </DropdownMenuItem>
    <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive" onSelect={handleSignOut}>
      Sign out
    </DropdownMenuItem>
  </DropdownMenuContent>
</DropdownMenu>
```

#### Popover `Stable`

A floating panel anchored to a trigger, for secondary content shown on demand.

Import: `import { Popover, PopoverAnchor, PopoverContent, PopoverDescription, PopoverHeader, PopoverTitle, PopoverTrigger } from 'timds'`

Variants:
- `align`: `start`, `center`, `end`
- `side`: `top`, `right`, `bottom`, `left`

Props:
- `align` (default: `center`) — Alignment of the content relative to the trigger.
- `side` (default: `bottom`) — Preferred side of the trigger to render on (flips on collision).
- `sideOffset` (default: `4`) — Distance in pixels between the content and the trigger.

Example:

```tsx
import { Button, Input, Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverHeader, PopoverTitle, PopoverTrigger } from 'timds'

<Popover>
  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
    <Button variant="outline">Open</Button>
  </PopoverTrigger>
  <PopoverContent align="start">
    <PopoverHeader>
      <PopoverTitle>Dimensions</PopoverTitle>
    </PopoverHeader>
    <Input aria-label="Width" defaultValue="100%" />
  </PopoverContent>
</Popover>
```

#### Tooltip `Stable`

A small floating label that explains an element on hover or keyboard focus.

Import: `import { Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from 'timds'`

Example:

```tsx
import { Button, Tooltip, TooltipContent, TooltipProvider, TooltipTrigger } from 'timds'

function SaveButton() {
  return (
    <TooltipProvider>
      <Tooltip>
        <TooltipTrigger asChild>
          <Button variant="outline" size="icon" aria-label="Save">
            <SaveIcon />
          </Button>
        </TooltipTrigger>
        <TooltipContent>Save changes</TooltipContent>
      </Tooltip>
    </TooltipProvider>
  )
}
```

## Page examples

### Dashboard

A full analytics dashboard: a collapsible `Sidebar` + `SidebarInset` shell, a sticky header, KPI `Card`s with trend `Badge`s, an area and a donut `Chart`, and a recent-sales `Table`. The capstone composition.

```tsx
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite'
import {
  ArrowDownRight,
  ArrowUpRight,
  BarChart3,
  Bell,
  CreditCard,
  DollarSign,
  LayoutDashboard,
  type LucideIcon,
  Search,
  Settings,
  Users,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { Area, AreaChart, CartesianGrid, Pie, PieChart, XAxis } from 'recharts'
import { expect, within } from 'storybook/test'

import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from '@/components/ui/avatar'
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import {
  Card,
  CardContent,
  CardDescription,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/card'
import {
  type ChartConfig,
  ChartContainer,
  ChartLegend,
  ChartLegendContent,
  ChartTooltip,
  ChartTooltipContent,
} from '@/components/ui/chart'
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
} from '@/components/ui/dropdown-menu'
import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon, InputGroupInput } from '@/components/ui/input-group'
import {
  Sidebar,
  SidebarContent,
  SidebarFooter,
  SidebarGroup,
  SidebarGroupContent,
  SidebarGroupLabel,
  SidebarHeader,
  SidebarInset,
  SidebarMenu,
  SidebarMenuBadge,
  SidebarMenuButton,
  SidebarMenuItem,
  SidebarProvider,
  SidebarRail,
  SidebarTrigger,
} from '@/components/ui/sidebar'
import {
  Table,
  TableBody,
  TableCell,
  TableHead,
  TableHeader,
  TableRow,
} from '@/components/ui/table'

/**
 * **Dashboard** — o exemplo mais completo: um shell de aplicação com `Sidebar`
 * colapsável, cabeçalho fixo, cartões de métrica com indicadores de tendência,
 * dois gráficos (`Chart`/Recharts) e uma tabela de vendas recentes. Reúne quase
 * todas as famílias do design system numa única tela coerente.
 */
const meta = {
  title: 'Examples/Dashboard',
  parameters: {
    layout: 'fullscreen',
    docs: {
      story: { inline: false, height: '720px' },
      description: {
        component:
          'A full analytics dashboard: a collapsible `Sidebar` + `SidebarInset` ' +
          'shell, a sticky header, KPI `Card`s with trend `Badge`s, an area and a ' +
          'donut `Chart`, and a recent-sales `Table`. The capstone composition.',
      },
    },
  },
} satisfies Meta

export default meta

type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/*  Dados                                                                       */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

const revenueData = [
  { month: 'Jan', receita: 4200, despesa: 2400 },
  { month: 'Fev', receita: 5100, despesa: 2800 },
  { month: 'Mar', receita: 4800, despesa: 3100 },
  { month: 'Abr', receita: 6300, despesa: 3300 },
  { month: 'Mai', receita: 7200, despesa: 3600 },
  { month: 'Jun', receita: 8100, despesa: 3900 },
]

const revenueConfig = {
  receita: { label: 'Receita', color: 'var(--chart-1)' },
  despesa: { label: 'Despesa', color: 'var(--chart-2)' },
} satisfies ChartConfig

const channelData = [
  { channel: 'organico', visitas: 1240, fill: 'var(--color-organico)' },
  { channel: 'social', visitas: 860, fill: 'var(--color-social)' },
  { channel: 'pago', visitas: 540, fill: 'var(--color-pago)' },
  { channel: 'direto', visitas: 420, fill: 'var(--color-direto)' },
]

const channelConfig = {
  visitas: { label: 'Visitas' },
  organico: { label: 'Orgânico', color: 'var(--chart-1)' },
  social: { label: 'Social', color: 'var(--chart-2)' },
  pago: { label: 'Pago', color: 'var(--chart-3)' },
  direto: { label: 'Direto', color: 'var(--chart-4)' },
} satisfies ChartConfig

const kpis: {
  label: string
  value: string
  delta: string
  up: boolean
  icon: LucideIcon
}[] = [
  { label: 'Receita', value: 'R$ 45.231', delta: '+20,1%', up: true, icon: DollarSign },
  { label: 'Assinantes', value: '2.350', delta: '+12,4%', up: true, icon: Users },
  { label: 'Vendas', value: '1.024', delta: '+8,2%', up: true, icon: CreditCard },
  {
    label: 'Cancelamentos',
    value: '38',
    delta: '-3,1%',
    up: false,
    icon: ArrowDownRight,
  },
]

const sales = [
  { name: 'Ana Souza', email: 'ana@timds.dev', amount: 'R$ 1.999', img: 47 },
  { name: 'Bruno Lima', email: 'bruno@timds.dev', amount: 'R$ 39', img: 12 },
  { name: 'Carla Dias', email: 'carla@timds.dev', amount: 'R$ 299', img: 5 },
  { name: 'Diego Reis', email: 'diego@timds.dev', amount: 'R$ 99', img: 33 },
]

const navItems: { title: string; icon: LucideIcon; badge?: string }[] = [
  { title: 'Dashboard', icon: LayoutDashboard },
  { title: 'Análises', icon: BarChart3 },
  { title: 'Clientes', icon: Users, badge: '24' },
  { title: 'Pagamentos', icon: CreditCard },
  { title: 'Configurações', icon: Settings },
]

/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */
/*  Subcomponentes                                                              */
/* -------------------------------------------------------------------------- */

function KpiCard({ label, value, delta, up, icon: Icon }: (typeof kpis)[number]) {
  return (
    <Card>
      <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between gap-2 pb-2">
        <CardDescription>{label}</CardDescription>
        <Icon className="size-4 text-muted-foreground" aria-hidden="true" />
      </CardHeader>
      <CardContent className="flex flex-col gap-1">
        <span className="font-bold text-2xl tracking-tight">{value}</span>
        <Badge variant={up ? 'success' : 'destructive'} className="w-fit gap-1">
          {up ? (
            <ArrowUpRight className="size-3" aria-hidden="true" />
          ) : (
            <ArrowDownRight className="size-3" aria-hidden="true" />
          )}
          {delta}
        </Badge>
      </CardContent>
    </Card>
  )
}

function DashboardApp() {
  return (
    <SidebarProvider>
      <Sidebar collapsible="icon">
        <SidebarHeader>
          <SidebarMenu>
            <SidebarMenuItem>
              <SidebarMenuButton size="lg" tooltip="timds">
                <div className="flex aspect-square size-8 items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-sidebar-primary text-sidebar-primary-foreground">
                  t
                </div>
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5 leading-none">
                  <span className="font-semibold">timds</span>
                  <span className="text-xs">Analytics</span>
                </div>
              </SidebarMenuButton>
            </SidebarMenuItem>
          </SidebarMenu>
        </SidebarHeader>
        <SidebarContent>
          <SidebarGroup>
            <SidebarGroupLabel>Plataforma</SidebarGroupLabel>
            <SidebarGroupContent>
              <SidebarMenu>
                {navItems.map((item, i) => (
                  <SidebarMenuItem key={item.title}>
                    <SidebarMenuButton tooltip={item.title} isActive={i === 0}>
                      <item.icon />
                      <span>{item.title}</span>
                    </SidebarMenuButton>
                    {item.badge ? (
                      <SidebarMenuBadge>{item.badge}</SidebarMenuBadge>
                    ) : null}
                  </SidebarMenuItem>
                ))}
              </SidebarMenu>
            </SidebarGroupContent>
          </SidebarGroup>
        </SidebarContent>
        <SidebarFooter>
          <SidebarMenu>
            <SidebarMenuItem>
              <SidebarMenuButton size="lg" tooltip="Ana Souza">
                <Avatar className="size-8">
                  <AvatarImage src="https://i.pravatar.cc/80?img=47" alt="Ana Souza" />
                  <AvatarFallback>AS</AvatarFallback>
                </Avatar>
                <div className="flex flex-col gap-0.5 leading-none">
                  <span className="font-semibold">Ana Souza</span>
                  <span className="text-xs">ana@timds.dev</span>
                </div>
              </SidebarMenuButton>
            </SidebarMenuItem>
          </SidebarMenu>
        </SidebarFooter>
        <SidebarRail />
      </Sidebar>

      <SidebarInset>
        {/* Cabeçalho fixo */}
        <header className="sticky top-0 z-10 flex h-14 items-center gap-3 border-b bg-background/95 px-4 backdrop-blur">
          <SidebarTrigger />
          <h1 className="font-semibold text-base">Dashboard</h1>
          <div className="ml-auto flex items-center gap-2">
            <InputGroup className="hidden w-56 sm:flex">
              <InputGroupAddon>
                <Search className="size-4" aria-hidden="true" />
              </InputGroupAddon>
              <InputGroupInput placeholder="Buscar..." aria-label="Buscar" />
            </InputGroup>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="icon" aria-label="Notificações">
              <Bell className="size-4" aria-hidden="true" />
            </Button>
            <DropdownMenu>
              <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
                <Button
                  variant="ghost"
                  size="icon"
                  className="rounded-full"
                  aria-label="Conta"
                >
                  <Avatar className="size-7">
                    <AvatarImage src="https://i.pravatar.cc/80?img=47" alt="Ana Souza" />
                    <AvatarFallback>AS</AvatarFallback>
                  </Avatar>
                </Button>
              </DropdownMenuTrigger>
              <DropdownMenuContent align="end">
                <DropdownMenuLabel>Minha conta</DropdownMenuLabel>
                <DropdownMenuItem>Perfil</DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuItem>Faturamento</DropdownMenuItem>
                <DropdownMenuSeparator />
                <DropdownMenuItem variant="destructive">Sair</DropdownMenuItem>
              </DropdownMenuContent>
            </DropdownMenu>
          </div>
        </header>

        {/* Conteúdo */}
        <div className="flex flex-1 flex-col gap-4 p-4">
          {/* KPIs */}
          <div className="grid gap-4 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-4">
            {kpis.map((kpi) => (
              <KpiCard key={kpi.label} {...kpi} />
            ))}
          </div>

          {/* Gráficos */}
          <div className="grid gap-4 lg:grid-cols-3">
            <Card className="lg:col-span-2">
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Receita x Despesa</CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>Últimos 6 meses</CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <ChartContainer config={revenueConfig} className="h-[260px] w-full">
                  <AreaChart
                    accessibilityLayer
                    data={revenueData}
                    margin={{ left: 12, right: 12 }}
                  >
                    <defs>
                      <linearGradient id="dashReceita" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                        <stop
                          offset="5%"
                          stopColor="var(--color-receita)"
                          stopOpacity={0.8}
                        />
                        <stop
                          offset="95%"
                          stopColor="var(--color-receita)"
                          stopOpacity={0.1}
                        />
                      </linearGradient>
                      <linearGradient id="dashDespesa" x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="1">
                        <stop
                          offset="5%"
                          stopColor="var(--color-despesa)"
                          stopOpacity={0.8}
                        />
                        <stop
                          offset="95%"
                          stopColor="var(--color-despesa)"
                          stopOpacity={0.1}
                        />
                      </linearGradient>
                    </defs>
                    <CartesianGrid vertical={false} />
                    <XAxis
                      dataKey="month"
                      tickLine={false}
                      axisLine={false}
                      tickMargin={8}
                    />
                    <ChartTooltip cursor={false} content={<ChartTooltipContent />} />
                    <Area
                      dataKey="receita"
                      type="natural"
                      fill="url(#dashReceita)"
                      stroke="var(--color-receita)"
                      stackId="a"
                    />
                    <Area
                      dataKey="despesa"
                      type="natural"
                      fill="url(#dashDespesa)"
                      stroke="var(--color-despesa)"
                      stackId="b"
                    />
                    <ChartLegend content={<ChartLegendContent />} />
                  </AreaChart>
                </ChartContainer>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>

            <Card>
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>Tráfego por canal</CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>Origem das visitas</CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent>
                <ChartContainer
                  config={channelConfig}
                  className="mx-auto aspect-square max-h-[260px]"
                >
                  <PieChart>
                    <ChartTooltip
                      content={<ChartTooltipContent nameKey="visitas" hideLabel />}
                    />
                    <Pie
                      data={channelData}
                      dataKey="visitas"
                      nameKey="channel"
                      innerRadius={55}
                    />
                    <ChartLegend
                      content={<ChartLegendContent nameKey="channel" />}
                      className="flex-wrap gap-2"
                    />
                  </PieChart>
                </ChartContainer>
              </CardContent>
            </Card>
          </div>

          {/* Vendas recentes */}
          <Card>
            <CardHeader>
              <CardTitle>Vendas recentes</CardTitle>
              <CardDescription>Você fez 265 vendas este mês.</CardDescription>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="px-0">
              <Table>
                <TableHeader>
                  <TableRow>
                    <TableHead className="pl-6">Cliente</TableHead>
                    <TableHead className="text-right pr-6">Valor</TableHead>
                  </TableRow>
                </TableHeader>
                <TableBody>
                  {sales.map((sale) => (
                    <TableRow key={sale.email}>
                      <TableCell className="pl-6">
                        <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                          <Avatar className="size-8">
                            <AvatarImage
                              src={`https://i.pravatar.cc/80?img=${sale.img}`}
                              alt={sale.name}
                            />
                            <AvatarFallback>
                              {sale.name
                                .split(' ')
                                .map((n) => n[0])
                                .join('')}
                            </AvatarFallback>
                          </Avatar>
                          <div className="flex flex-col">
                            <span className="font-medium">{sale.name}</span>
                            <span className="text-muted-foreground text-xs">
                              {sale.email}
                            </span>
                          </div>
                        </div>
                      </TableCell>
                      <TableCell className="pr-6 text-right font-medium">
                        {sale.amount}
                      </TableCell>
                    </TableRow>
                  ))}
                </TableBody>
              </Table>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        </div>
      </SidebarInset>
    </SidebarProvider>
  )
}

export const Default: Story = {
  render: () => <DashboardApp />,
  play: async ({ canvasElement }) => {
    const canvas = within(canvasElement)
    await expect(canvas.getByRole('heading', { name: 'Dashboard' })).toBeInTheDocument()
    await expect(canvas.getByText('R$ 45.231')).toBeInTheDocument()
    // A navegação marca o item ativo.
    await expect(canvas.getByRole('button', { name: 'Dashboard' })).toHaveAttribute(
      'data-active',
      'true',
    )
  },
}

```

### Login

A focused authentication card composed from `Card`, `InputGroup`, `Button`, `Checkbox` and `Separator`. Inputs are labelled, the icon-only nature of the addons is decorative, and every color comes from a semantic token.

```tsx
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite'
import { Lock, Mail } from 'lucide-react'
import { expect, within } from 'storybook/test'

import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import {
  Card,
  CardContent,
  CardDescription,
  CardFooter,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Checkbox } from '@/components/ui/checkbox'
import { InputGroup, InputGroupAddon, InputGroupInput } from '@/components/ui/input-group'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'

/**
 * **Login** — o exemplo mais simples do conjunto. Mostra como uma única `Card`
 * organiza um formulário curto: campos com ícone (`InputGroup`), ações primárias
 * e secundárias, um divisor semântico e provedores sociais. Tudo apoiado nos
 * tokens do design system, sem nenhuma cor solta.
 */
const meta = {
  title: 'Examples/Login',
  parameters: {
    layout: 'fullscreen',
    docs: {
      description: {
        component:
          'A focused authentication card composed from `Card`, `InputGroup`, ' +
          '`Button`, `Checkbox` and `Separator`. Inputs are labelled, the ' +
          'icon-only nature of the addons is decorative, and every color comes ' +
          'from a semantic token.',
      },
    },
  },
} satisfies Meta

export default meta

type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>

export const Default: Story = {
  render: () => (
    <div className="flex min-h-[calc(100vh-3rem)] items-center justify-center">
      <Card className="w-full max-w-sm">
        <CardHeader className="text-center">
          <div className="mx-auto flex size-11 items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-primary text-primary-foreground shadow-sm">
            <Lock className="size-5" aria-hidden="true" />
          </div>
          <CardTitle className="text-xl">Acesse sua conta</CardTitle>
          <CardDescription>Entre com seu e-mail e senha para continuar</CardDescription>
        </CardHeader>

        <CardContent className="flex flex-col gap-4">
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
            <label htmlFor="login-email" className="text-sm font-medium">
              E-mail
            </label>
            <InputGroup>
              <InputGroupAddon>
                <Mail className="size-4" aria-hidden="true" />
              </InputGroupAddon>
              <InputGroupInput
                id="login-email"
                type="email"
                placeholder="voce@exemplo.com"
                autoComplete="email"
              />
            </InputGroup>
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2">
            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
              <label htmlFor="login-password" className="text-sm font-medium">
                Senha
              </label>
              <a
                href="#redefinir"
                className="text-sm font-medium text-primary-text hover:underline"
              >
                Esqueceu?
              </a>
            </div>
            <InputGroup>
              <InputGroupAddon>
                <Lock className="size-4" aria-hidden="true" />
              </InputGroupAddon>
              <InputGroupInput
                id="login-password"
                type="password"
                placeholder="••••••••"
                autoComplete="current-password"
              />
            </InputGroup>
          </div>

          <label
            htmlFor="login-remember"
            className="flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-muted-foreground"
          >
            <Checkbox id="login-remember" defaultChecked /> Manter conectado
          </label>

          <Button className="w-full">Entrar</Button>

          <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
            <Separator className="flex-1" />
            <span className="text-xs text-muted-foreground">ou continue com</span>
            <Separator className="flex-1" />
          </div>

          <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
            <Button variant="outline">GitHub</Button>
            <Button variant="outline">Google</Button>
          </div>
        </CardContent>

        <CardFooter className="justify-center">
          <p className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">
            Não tem conta?{' '}
            <a href="#criar" className="font-medium text-primary-text hover:underline">
              Criar agora
            </a>
          </p>
        </CardFooter>
      </Card>
    </div>
  ),
  play: async ({ canvasElement }) => {
    const canvas = within(canvasElement)
    // O título e o CTA principal montam, e o e-mail tem rótulo associado.
    await expect(canvas.getByText('Acesse sua conta')).toBeInTheDocument()
    await expect(canvas.getByLabelText('E-mail')).toBeInTheDocument()
    await expect(canvas.getByRole('button', { name: 'Entrar' })).toBeInTheDocument()
  },
}

```

### Notifications

A filterable activity feed: `Tabs` switch between all / unread / mentions, each row is an `Item` with media, content and actions, and an unread dot plus a count `Badge` track local state.

```tsx
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite'
import {
  AtSign,
  CheckCheck,
  GitPullRequest,
  Heart,
  type LucideIcon,
  MessageSquare,
} from 'lucide-react'
import { useMemo, useState } from 'react'
import { expect, userEvent, within } from 'storybook/test'

import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card'
import {
  Item,
  ItemActions,
  ItemContent,
  ItemDescription,
  ItemMedia,
  ItemTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/item'
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs'

/**
 * **Notifications** — um feed de atividades filtrável. Mostra `Tabs` como filtro,
 * `Item` como linha rica (ícone, título, descrição e ações) e o uso de um ponto
 * de "não lida" + `Badge` de contagem que reagem ao estado local.
 */
const meta = {
  title: 'Examples/Notifications',
  parameters: {
    layout: 'fullscreen',
    docs: {
      description: {
        component:
          'A filterable activity feed: `Tabs` switch between all / unread / ' +
          'mentions, each row is an `Item` with media, content and actions, and an ' +
          'unread dot plus a count `Badge` track local state.',
      },
    },
  },
} satisfies Meta

export default meta

type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>

type Kind = 'comment' | 'mention' | 'pr' | 'like'

type Note = {
  id: string
  kind: Kind
  title: string
  description: string
  when: string
  read: boolean
}

const ICONS: Record<Kind, LucideIcon> = {
  comment: MessageSquare,
  mention: AtSign,
  pr: GitPullRequest,
  like: Heart,
}

const initial: Note[] = [
  {
    id: '1',
    kind: 'mention',
    title: 'Bruno Lima mencionou você',
    description: '“@ana pode revisar os tokens de contraste?” em #design-system',
    when: 'há 5 min',
    read: false,
  },
  {
    id: '2',
    kind: 'pr',
    title: 'PR #128 aguardando revisão',
    description: 'feat(table): agrupamento de linhas com header fixo',
    when: 'há 1 hora',
    read: false,
  },
  {
    id: '3',
    kind: 'comment',
    title: 'Carla Dias comentou',
    description: 'Adorei o novo Donut chart no dashboard!',
    when: 'há 3 horas',
    read: false,
  },
  {
    id: '4',
    kind: 'like',
    title: 'Diego Reis curtiu sua atualização',
    description: 'Release v0.4 — novos tokens de texto acessíveis',
    when: 'ontem',
    read: true,
  },
  {
    id: '5',
    kind: 'mention',
    title: 'Elena Prado mencionou você',
    description: '“@ana fechamos a sprint amanhã” em #produto',
    when: 'ontem',
    read: true,
  },
]

function NotificationsFeed() {
  const [notes, setNotes] = useState(initial)
  const [tab, setTab] = useState<'all' | 'unread' | 'mentions'>('all')

  const unreadCount = notes.filter((n) => !n.read).length

  const visible = useMemo(() => {
    if (tab === 'unread') return notes.filter((n) => !n.read)
    if (tab === 'mentions') return notes.filter((n) => n.kind === 'mention')
    return notes
  }, [notes, tab])

  function markRead(id: string) {
    setNotes((prev) => prev.map((n) => (n.id === id ? { ...n, read: true } : n)))
  }

  function markAll() {
    setNotes((prev) => prev.map((n) => ({ ...n, read: true })))
  }

  return (
    <div className="mx-auto max-w-2xl py-2">
      <Card>
        <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between gap-2">
          <CardTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
            Notificações
            {unreadCount > 0 ? <Badge>{unreadCount}</Badge> : null}
          </CardTitle>
          <Button
            variant="ghost"
            size="sm"
            onClick={markAll}
            disabled={unreadCount === 0}
          >
            <CheckCheck className="size-4" aria-hidden="true" /> Marcar todas
          </Button>
        </CardHeader>

        <CardContent>
          <Tabs value={tab} onValueChange={(v) => setTab(v as typeof tab)}>
            <TabsList className="w-full">
              <TabsTrigger value="all" className="flex-1">
                Todas
              </TabsTrigger>
              <TabsTrigger value="unread" className="flex-1">
                Não lidas
              </TabsTrigger>
              <TabsTrigger value="mentions" className="flex-1">
                Menções
              </TabsTrigger>
            </TabsList>

            <TabsContent value={tab} className="pt-3">
              <div className="flex flex-col gap-1">
                {visible.map((note) => {
                  const Icon = ICONS[note.kind]
                  return (
                    <Item key={note.id} variant={note.read ? 'default' : 'muted'}>
                      <ItemMedia variant="icon">
                        <Icon className="size-4" aria-hidden="true" />
                      </ItemMedia>
                      <ItemContent>
                        <ItemTitle className="flex items-center gap-2">
                          {note.title}
                          {!note.read ? (
                            <>
                              <span
                                className="size-2 rounded-full bg-primary"
                                aria-hidden="true"
                              />
                              <span className="sr-only">Não lida</span>
                            </>
                          ) : null}
                        </ItemTitle>
                        <ItemDescription>{note.description}</ItemDescription>
                        <ItemDescription className="text-xs">{note.when}</ItemDescription>
                      </ItemContent>
                      <ItemActions>
                        {!note.read ? (
                          <Button
                            variant="ghost"
                            size="sm"
                            onClick={() => markRead(note.id)}
                          >
                            Marcar lida
                          </Button>
                        ) : null}
                      </ItemActions>
                    </Item>
                  )
                })}
                {visible.length === 0 ? (
                  <p className="py-10 text-center text-muted-foreground text-sm">
                    Tudo em dia. Nenhuma notificação por aqui.
                  </p>
                ) : null}
              </div>
            </TabsContent>
          </Tabs>
        </CardContent>
      </Card>
    </div>
  )
}

export const Default: Story = {
  render: () => <NotificationsFeed />,
  play: async ({ canvasElement }) => {
    const canvas = within(canvasElement)
    // Começa com 3 não lidas; o filtro "Não lidas" mostra exatamente essas.
    await expect(canvas.getByText('3')).toBeInTheDocument()
    await userEvent.click(canvas.getByRole('tab', { name: 'Não lidas' }))
    const markButtons = canvas.getAllByRole('button', { name: 'Marcar lida' })
    await expect(markButtons).toHaveLength(3)
    // Marcar todas zera o contador e desabilita o botão.
    await userEvent.click(canvas.getByRole('button', { name: /Marcar todas/ }))
    await expect(
      canvas.queryByRole('button', { name: 'Marcar lida' }),
    ).not.toBeInTheDocument()
  },
}

```

### Pricing

A pricing section: three `Card` tiers, a recommended tier highlighted with a brand ring and a `Badge`, feature lists with success-colored check icons, and a monthly/yearly `Tabs` toggle that recomputes prices.

```tsx
import type { Meta, StoryObj } from '@storybook/react-vite'
import { Check, Sparkles } from 'lucide-react'
import { useState } from 'react'
import { expect, userEvent, within } from 'storybook/test'

import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge'
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button'
import {
  Card,
  CardContent,
  CardDescription,
  CardFooter,
  CardHeader,
  CardTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/card'
import { Separator } from '@/components/ui/separator'
import { ToggleGroup, ToggleGroupItem } from '@/components/ui/toggle-group'

/**
 * **Pricing** — uma página de marketing. Mostra como `Card` + `Badge` + `Button`
 * compõem um comparativo de planos, com um destaque visual no plano recomendado
 * (borda e anel na cor da marca) e um seletor de período em `Tabs` que recalcula
 * os preços.
 */
const meta = {
  title: 'Examples/Pricing',
  parameters: {
    layout: 'fullscreen',
    docs: {
      description: {
        component:
          'A pricing section: three `Card` tiers, a recommended tier highlighted ' +
          'with a brand ring and a `Badge`, feature lists with success-colored ' +
          'check icons, and a monthly/yearly `Tabs` toggle that recomputes prices.',
      },
    },
  },
} satisfies Meta

export default meta

type Story = StoryObj<typeof meta>

type Plan = {
  name: string
  description: string
  monthly: number
  features: string[]
  cta: string
  variant: 'outline' | 'default'
  featured?: boolean
}

const plans: Plan[] = [
  {
    name: 'Starter',
    description: 'Para projetos pessoais e protótipos.',
    monthly: 0,
    features: [
      '1 projeto',
      '5 mil eventos/mês',
      'Dashboards básicos',
      'Suporte por e-mail',
    ],
    cta: 'Começar grátis',
    variant: 'outline',
  },
  {
    name: 'Pro',
    description: 'Para times em crescimento.',
    monthly: 29,
    features: [
      'Projetos ilimitados',
      '1 milhão de eventos/mês',
      'Dashboards avançados',
      'Integrações e webhooks',
      'Suporte prioritário',
    ],
    cta: 'Assinar Pro',
    variant: 'default',
    featured: true,
  },
  {
    name: 'Enterprise',
    description: 'Para organizações com escala.',
    monthly: 99,
    features: [
      'Tudo do Pro',
      'SSO e SAML',
      'Limites personalizados',
      'SLA dedicado',
      'Gerente de conta',
    ],
    cta: 'Falar com vendas',
    variant: 'outline',
  },
]

function PricingTable() {
  const [period, setPeriod] = useState<'monthly' | 'yearly'>('monthly')
  const yearly = period === 'yearly'

  return (
    <div className="mx-auto flex max-w-5xl flex-col gap-8 py-6">
      <header className="flex flex-col items-center gap-4 text-center">
        <Badge variant="secondary" className="gap-1">
          <Sparkles className="size-3.5" aria-hidden="true" /> Preços simples
        </Badge>
        <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold tracking-tight">
          Escolha o plano ideal para você
        </h1>
        <p className="max-w-xl text-muted-foreground">
          Comece de graça e evolua conforme cresce. Sem surpresas, cancele quando quiser.
        </p>
        <ToggleGroup
          type="single"
          variant="outline"
          value={period}
          onValueChange={(v) => v && setPeriod(v as 'monthly' | 'yearly')}
          aria-label="Período de cobrança"
        >
          <ToggleGroupItem value="monthly">Mensal</ToggleGroupItem>
          <ToggleGroupItem value="yearly">
            Anual
            <Badge variant="success" className="ml-2">
              -20%
            </Badge>
          </ToggleGroupItem>
        </ToggleGroup>
      </header>

      <div className="grid gap-6 md:grid-cols-3">
        {plans.map((plan) => {
          const price = yearly ? Math.round(plan.monthly * 12 * 0.8) : plan.monthly
          const suffix = plan.monthly === 0 ? '' : yearly ? '/ano' : '/mês'
          return (
            <Card
              key={plan.name}
              className={
                plan.featured
                  ? 'relative border-primary shadow-lg ring-1 ring-primary'
                  : undefined
              }
            >
              {plan.featured ? (
                <Badge className="-top-3 absolute right-6">Mais popular</Badge>
              ) : null}
              <CardHeader>
                <CardTitle>{plan.name}</CardTitle>
                <CardDescription>{plan.description}</CardDescription>
              </CardHeader>
              <CardContent className="flex flex-col gap-5">
                <div className="flex items-baseline gap-1">
                  <span className="text-4xl font-bold tracking-tight">R$ {price}</span>
                  {suffix ? (
                    <span className="text-sm text-muted-foreground">{suffix}</span>
                  ) : null}
                </div>
                <Separator />
                <ul className="flex flex-col gap-3 text-sm">
                  {plan.features.map((feature) => (
```
